output.changeDescription: Added md:justify-end and md:gap-0 to the <ul> element in both TSX and PHP. Mobile gap-4 (flex-col stacking) is preserved. On desktop: md:justify-end right-aligns all icon rows including wrapped lines; md:gap-0 removes inter-item gaps since each <li> provides sufficient padding. Prettier reformatted the TSX className onto its own line (auto-fixed via bun run format).

testPage.notes: No test page update needed — CSS-only change, no attribute or markup structure changes.
